creator: saper@saper.info
text:
This is palemoon-27.9.4_6 (both from pkg and manually built from ports)
on FreeBSD 11.2-STABLE amd64

I'd like to use WebIDE as described here

https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Tools/WebIDE/Opening_WebIDE

However when I start Palemoon it is not available in Tools -> Web Developer menu

pkg info -l palemoon | grep webide

gives zero lines of output

However after building the port we get some files in the .build directory

> find /usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build -name '*webide*'
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/_tests/testing/mochitest/browser/toolkit/devtools/webide
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/_tests/testing/mochitest/chrome/toolkit/devtools/webide
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/toolkit/devtools/webide
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/toolkit/devtools/webide/.deps/webide-prefs.js.pp
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/components/webideComponents.manifest
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/components/webideCli.js
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/webide
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/webide/content/webide.xul
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/webide/content/webide.js
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/webide/skin/webide.css
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/webide.manifest
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/en-US/locale/en-US/global/devtools/webide.properties
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/chrome/en-US/locale/en-US/global/devtools/webide.dtd
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/defaults/pref/webide-prefs.js
/usr/ports/www/palemoon/work/.build/dist/bin/modules/devtools/webide


They just do not get installed
